description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with a mix of light gray stone and white exterior walls, complemented by large, black-framed windows. The front facade includes a double garage with dark doors and a wide driveway leading up to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens to a private fenced yard with mature trees, providing a secluded outdoor space. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor set back and partially open, possibly for a rooftop terrace or garden. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The property sits on a rectangular green lawn, bordered by a paved walkway and driveway.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, stone and white walls, large black-framed windows, and a double garage, set on a green lawn with a fenced backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, and wide driveway with stone and white wall finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage's depth, the paved driveway, and the upper floor's setback design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical window arrangement and the continuation of the stone facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
